notes: Run only E007 as E007A because E007 was changed from risk_fraction optimization to target maintenance margin selection. Keep the E004-passed baseline fixed. Use standard candidates [150, 180, 200] and adopt the first candidate, checked from low to high, that satisfies safety conditions. maintenance_below_100_count > 0 is immediate NG. stop_triggered or maintenance_below_130_count > 0 means checking the next higher target maintenance margin. 120% line is not used for adoption. E007 summary min_maintenance_margin_pct and below counts should be interpreted as assumed maintenance margin if each trade immediately reaches SL.
